title: compute_lexical_substitution_score data payload
description: v0.24.0 sign2vec axis cash-out (methods paper §3.12 claim 30). Given two tablets A and B, aggregates per-sign sign2vec cosines into a tablet-level lexical-substitution score: the fraction of the larger vocabulary that is either exactly present in the other tablet OR represented via a sign2vec near-neighbor. Complements (does not replace) the existing lexical/fuzzy/thematic/scribal axes by surfacing same-MEANING-different-SIGN-TOKEN relationships. Score formula: (exact_overlap + substitution_matches) / max(|A_vocab|, |B_vocab|). max() denominator matches v0.22 stemma-distance design — does not over-penalize asymmetric size mismatches. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

tablet_a.description: Museum number of the first tablet (whitespace-trimmed).

tablet_b.description: Museum number of the second tablet (whitespace-trimmed).

tablet_a_vocab_size.description: Count of distinct non-X sign tokens in tablet A's trigrams_ordered stream.

tablet_b_vocab_size.description: Count of distinct non-X sign tokens in tablet B's trigrams_ordered stream.

exact_overlap.description: Count of signs in |A_vocab ∩ B_vocab| — distinct sign tokens that appear in both tablets.

substitution_matches.description: Count of signs s ∈ A_vocab \ B_vocab for which at least one of s's top-K sign2vec neighbors (cosine ≥ min_neighbor_cosine) appears in B_vocab. Each A-vocab sign contributes at most 1 to this count regardless of how many of its neighbors land in B.

substitution_pairs.description: Up to pair_sample_cap representative substitution pairs (a_sign in A_vocab, b_sign in B_vocab, cosine in sign2vec space). Ranked by cosine desc.

a_sign.description: Sign in A_vocab that is not in B_vocab.

b_sign.description: Neighbor of a_sign in sign2vec space that appears in B_vocab.

cosine.description: Cosine between a_sign and b_sign in the sign2vec embedding.

lexical_substitution_score.description: Primary output: (exact_overlap + substitution_matches) / max(|A_vocab|, |B_vocab|). Bounded in [0,1].

exact_share.description: exact_overlap / max(|A_vocab|, |B_vocab|) — the fraction of the larger vocab that is matched EXACTLY.

substitution_share.description: substitution_matches / max(|A_vocab|, |B_vocab|) — the fraction of the larger vocab matched via a sign2vec near-neighbor. The cash-out: a non-trivial substitution_share validates claim 30's hypothesis that sign2vec adds signal beyond exact-vocab share.

axis_comparison.description: Optional 4-axis context populated when include_axis_comparison=true. Lets callers read this tool's output as a 5-axis view of a tablet pair.

thematic_cosine.description: Random-indexing tablet-embedding cosine from compareTabletPair (when found).

scribal_cosine.description: LLR scribal-signature cosine from compareTabletPair (when found).

notes.description: Diagnostic notes for any axis that returned below_threshold or missing-index.

a_signs_without_embedding.description: Count of A-vocab-only signs skipped because they lack a sign2vec embedding (corpus occurrences < min_occurrences gate).

a_signs_probed.description: Count of A-vocab-only signs that were actually queried against sign2vec.

min_neighbor_cosine.description: Effective cosine floor for sign2vec neighbors.
